  You should have received a copy of the
  GNU Lesser General Public License along with AVLTREES.
  If not, see <https://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.

  SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-3.0-or-later

  File:          avarketr.ads (Ada Package Specification)
  Language:      Ada (1987) [1]
  Author:        Lev Kujawski
  Description:
    Self-balancing binary trees, based upon the algorithms developed
    by G. M. Adelson-Velsky and E. M. Landis [2].

  References:
  [1] Programming languages - Ada, ISO/IEC 8652:1987, 15 Jun. 1987.
  [2] G. M. Adelson-Velsky and E. M. Landis
      Doklady Akademii Nauk SSSR 146 (1962), 263-266
      English translation in
      "An algorithm for the organization of information",
      Soviet Math. Doklady 3 (1962) 1259-1263.

---------------------------------------------------------------------

subprograms.name: Clear
subprograms.code:
procedure Clear
  (The_Tree : in out T)

subprograms.name: Greatest_Key
subprograms.code:
function Greatest_Key
  (Within_The_Tree : in T)
   return Key_T

subprograms.name: Greatest_Key_Length
subprograms.code:
function Greatest_Key_Length
  (Within_The_Tree : in T)
   return Key_Index_T

subprograms.name: Height
subprograms.code:
function Height
  (Of_The_Tree : in T)
   return AVL_Tree_Heights.T

subprograms.name: Insert
Insert_or_Replace
Is_Empty
subprograms.code:
function Is_Empty
  (The_Tree : in T)
   return Boolean

subprograms.name: Is_Present
subprograms.code:
function Is_Present
  (Within_The_Tree : in T;
   The_Key         : in Key_T)
   return Boolean

subprograms.name: Least_Key
subprograms.code:
function Least_Key
  (Within_The_Tree : in T)
   return Key_T

subprograms.name: Least_Key_Length
subprograms.code:
function Least_Key_Length
  (Within_The_Tree : in T)
   return Key_Index_T

subprograms.name: Longest_Key_Length
subprograms.code:
function Longest_Key_Length
  (Within_The_Tree : in T)
   return Key_Index_T

subprograms.name: Nodes
subprograms.code:
function Nodes
  (Within_The_Tree : in T)
   return Natural

subprograms.name: Predecessor_Key
subprograms.code:
function Predecessor_Key
  (Within_The_Tree : in T;
   Of_The_Key      : in Key_T)
   return Key_T

subprograms.name: Remove
Replace
Replace_Greatest
Replace_Least
Replace_Predecessor
Replace_Successor
Retrieve
Retrieve_Greatest
Retrieve_Least
Retrieve_Predecessor
Retrieve_Successor
Successor_Key
subprograms.code:
function Successor_Key
  (Within_The_Tree : in T;
   Of_The_Key      : in Key_T)
   return Key_T

subprograms.name: Swap
Swap_Greatest
Swap_Least
Swap_Predecessor
Swap_Successor

formals.name: Is_Less_Than
formals.code:
function Is_Less_Than
(X : in Key_T;
Y : in Key_T)
return Boolean

documentation.description:
The use of Is_Less_Than mitigates a GNAT hiding warning that
would otherwise occur with "<".

formals.name: Key_T
formals.code: type Key_T is array (Key_Index_T range <>) of Key_Element_T;
